entities.name: Barthan
entities.raw_quote: minister of King Barthan

entities.name: Barthan
entities.raw_quote: minister of King Barthan

entities.name: Formione
entities.raw_quote: minister to King Formione

entities.name: Harthan
entities.raw_quote: Harthan... king of the daemons associated with the Moon and the west winds, said to be most mild (or gentle).

entities.name: Abaa
entities.raw_quote: minister of King Abaa

entities.name: Iammax

attributes.role: king of daemons/spirits of the air

entities.raw_quote: Iammax... king of daemons associated with Mars and the south. King of spirits of the air... said to be evil, arrogant, and wild. Also said to be "most mighty."

entities.name: Sarabocres

attributes.role: king of daemons or spirits of the air

entities.raw_quote: Sarabocres... king of daemons or spirits of the air, governing between the South and the West... Said to be "most noble."

entities.name: Corniger
entities.raw_quote: attendant of King Corniger, in the West.

entities.name: Maymon

attributes.role: king of spirits or daemons of the air

entities.raw_quote: Maymon... king of spirits or daemons of the air, governing in the North, subordinate to the planet Saturn

entities.name: Michael
entities.raw_quote: Michael... planetary spirit associated with the Moon. Name of one of four archangel... Name of this angel is found on the Seal of God.

entities.name: Gabriel
entities.raw_quote: Name of one of four archangel (along with Gabriel, Uriel, and Raphael).

entities.name: Uriel
entities.raw_quote: Name of one of four archangel (along with Michael, Gabriel, and Raphael); one of seven higher angels (along with Barachiel).

entities.name: Raphael
entities.raw_quote: Raphael... planetary spirit associated with the Sun and the east. Name of one of four archangel... Name of this angel is found on the Seal of God.

entities.name: Adonay
entities.raw_quote: Adonay, Hebrew. Also on Seal of God

entities.name: AGLA
entities.raw_quote: AGLA, Hebrew (acronym). Also in 72 names, as well as Seal of God

entities.name: Saday
entities.raw_quote: Saday, Hebrew, Shaddai. Also on Seal of God

entities.name: Tetragramaton
entities.raw_quote: Tetragramaton, Greek ("four lettered")

entities.name: Seal of God
entities.raw_quote: Name of this angel is found on the Seal of God.

entities.name: Zephyr
entities.raw_quote: which is called Zephyr.

entities.name: Subsolanus
entities.raw_quote: which is called "Subsolanus" (the east wind)

summary: This chunk contains an index of spirit names, divine names, and ritual elements from the Liber Juratus. It details hierarchies of kings, daemons, and angels associated with planetary bodies (Sun, Moon, Mars, etc.) and cardinal winds, as well as references to the Seal of God.
key_passages: Name of this angel is found on the Seal of God.
Iammax... king of daemons associated with Mars and the south. King of spirits of the air... said to be evil, arrogant, and wild.
AGLA, Hebrew (acronym). Also in 72 names, as well as Seal of God
Saday, Hebrew, Shaddai. Also on Seal of God
